title: We stopped AI bot spam in our GitHub repo using Git's –author flag
summary: 该帖子介绍了如何利用Git的`--author`标志过滤AI机器人提交的垃圾信息，看点在于提供了一种简单实用的反爬虫与防垃圾提交的代码库管理技巧。

title: We let AIs run radio stations
text:
Hey HN!

I'm Lukas from Andon Labs. We let AIs run companies without humans in the loop and report to the public on what can go wrong. Previously, we've done experiments in retail (vending machines, stores, and cafes), but we just launched one in the media sector. We gave four AI agents all the tools they need to both broadcast radio shows live and handle all the business side of running a media company. The agents' revenue is so far terrible (you can try to strike a sponsor deal with them if you want!), but their shows are at times hilarious. You can listen to them at andon.fm, I hope you enjoy this!
summary: 这个帖子介绍了一个让四个AI代理完全自主运营一家广播电台的实验，看点在于AI在节目制作和商业运营中的表现既搞笑又糟糕，甚至欢迎用户尝试与它们谈赞助。

title: Show HN: Files.md – Open-source alternative to Obsidian
summary: Files.md 是一个开源的 Obsidian 替代品，亮点在于完全基于本地文件系统，无需数据库，主打极简与隐私。

title: Agora-1: The Multi-Agent World Model
summary: Agora-1是一个多智能体世界模型，能模拟多个AI代理在复杂环境中的交互与协作，看点在于其推动通用人工智能向群体智能发展的潜力。

title: Cutting inference cold starts by 40x with LP, FUSE, C/R, and CUDA-checkpoint
summary: 该帖子介绍了Modal通过结合线性规划、FUSE、检查点恢复和CUDA检查点技术，将GPU推理冷启动时间缩短40倍的方法，核心看点是实现真正的无服务器GPU推理。

title: Stratum: System-Hardware Co-Design with 3D-Stackable DRAM for Efficient Moe
summary: 该论文提出了一种名为Stratum的系统-硬件协同设计方案，通过3D堆叠DRAM优化混合专家模型（MoE）的效率，看点在于利用硬件架构创新解决大模型推理中的内存瓶颈问题。

title: Voice AI Systems Are Vulnerable to Hidden Audio Attacks
summary: 该帖子指出，语音AI系统易受隐藏音频攻击，通过人耳无法察觉的噪声操控智能设备，揭示了当前语音助手的重大安全隐患。

title: Qwen 3.7 Preview
summary: 阿里发布Qwen 3.7预览版，看点在于新模型在推理、多模态和长文本处理上的性能提升。
